culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:cupid
culture_notes.note: Link executed during pre-game / Night 0. Lovers inherit linked_death passive plus config-defined knowledge/cascade.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:guard
culture_notes.note: Config controls self-protect, repeat-target limits, and double-save behaviour with Witch.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:hunter
culture_notes.note: Trigger availability (poison vs heal deaths) is driven by culture config.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:knight
culture_notes.note: Duel resolves immediately during day phase before vote.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:lovers_helper
culture_notes.note: Not draftable. Provides catalog metadata for applying the lovers persistent effect outside Cupid's pre-game action.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:prophet
culture_notes.note: Investigation reveals alignment only; no role specifics.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:prophet
culture_notes.note: Scenario DSL should apply culture-configured result strings.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:sheriff_badge_helper
culture_notes.note: Not draftable. Provides catalog intent metadata for sheriff badge lifecycle commands.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:white_wolf_carry
culture_notes.note: Attach as persistent effect or modifier to the designated wolf when option enabled.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:white_wolf_king
culture_notes.note: Self-destruct resolves during the designated day window, sacrificing the king while issuing an extra kill on the chosen target.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:witch
culture_notes.note: Heal potion availability obeys culture toggles (self-save rules, night-one allowance).

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:witch
culture_notes.note: Poison potion is once per game; culture resolves timing relative to guard/witch order.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:wolf
culture_notes.note: Factional kill resolves via coordinated wolf vote; individual entry mirrors the shared kill template.

culture_notes.name: chinese_structured:wolf_beauty
culture_notes.note: Charm action overwrites previous mark. Drag triggers on day elimination (lynch or witch poison).
